people.text: Ella wants to hear classical music in a relaxed place. She has never been to a concert before and feels nervous.
Max enjoys dancing and wants live music outdoors. He is going with friends on Saturday night.
Sara plays guitar and wants to learn from professional musicians. She would like a small workshop, not just a show.
Owen wants a music event for his young children. It should be during the day and not too long.
Priya likes discovering new local bands. She wants cheap tickets and a place near the bus station.

texts.text: Summer Beats takes place [7]outside in Riverside Park[/7] on [7]Saturday evening[/7]. Several bands play dance music, and there is plenty of space for groups of friends.
Choir History is a lecture about church music, with no live performance.
First Notes is an informal classical concert for beginners. The presenter explains each piece simply, and the relaxed hall helps [6]people attending their first concert[/6] feel comfortable.
Guitar Lab is a workshop for twenty players. Professional musicians demonstrate techniques and then give [8]personal advice[/8] while participants practise in small groups.
Drum Marathon lasts six hours and is recommended for experienced adult musicians only.
Opera Gold is a formal evening performance with expensive seats and no spoken introductions.
Mini Music Morning is for [9]children aged three to seven[/9]. It starts at [9]11 a.m.[/9], lasts forty minutes and includes simple songs, movement and percussion games.
New Sounds Night presents three local bands each week. Tickets are [10]low-priced[/10], and the venue is five minutes from [10]the main bus station[/10].

answers.explanation: Ella needs a relaxed classical concert for beginners.
Max wants outdoor live dance music on Saturday night.
Sara needs a small guitar workshop with professionals.
Owen needs a short daytime event for children.
Priya wants cheap local bands near buses.
